struct QueryBuilder {
    table: String,
    filters: Vec<String>,
    limit: Option<usize>,
    offset: Option<usize>,
    distinct: bool,
    case_sensitive: bool,
    include_deleted: bool,
    count_only: bool,
}

impl QueryBuilder {
    fn new(table: &str) -> Self {
        Self {
            table: table.into(),
            filters: Vec::new(),
            limit: None,
            offset: None,
            distinct: false,
            case_sensitive: true,
            include_deleted: false,
            count_only: false,
        }
    }

    fn build(self) -> String {
        format!("SELECT * FROM {}", self.table)
    }
}

fn run_query() {
    let qb = QueryBuilder::new("users");
    let _ = qb.build();
}
